description: This established laundromat in a rural Midwest town has been serving the community for over 25 years. seller_motivation: Owner retiring after decades of operation, motivated to sell quickly.

description: This vending machine route consists of 10 machines placed in high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms in suburban Florida.
